case_title: JOSE ROMERO VS. ANA MARIA MAJANO

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT MAJANO, ANA MARIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT MAJANO, ANA MARIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JOSE SERVED NOV-13-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAJANO, ANA MARIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAJANO, ANA MARIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: A ROOM AT 1015 CORTLAND AVE., CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, ***ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT HAS BEEN CANCELED***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT MAJANO, ANA MARIA

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MAJANO, ANA MARIA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MAJANO, ANA MARIA

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MAJANO, ANA MARIA
